EXP-260.description: New §4.2.7a (Station-by-station coverage under dome geometry) inserted into sections.json part4. Quantifies that all 9 of dome's published eclipse stations sit outside the dome-geometry penumbra band. Closest station (Ebro) is 444 km from dome-geometry umbra path — ~10× the 85 km penumbra radius. Substantial new scientific content (1362 words, full station table). Queued for curmudgeon review (qid 270).

EXP-262.description:
Refraction robustness content confirmed already in §4.2.7 from operator rescue commit 228df64. Present as inline paragraph (Robustness to altitude convention) rather than

header as EXP-262 specified, but substance identical. Marked integrated in expansion-tracker.
